label: 第125話
source_locator: 単行本15巻 目次 p.7
summary_short: 釘崎は幼少期に出会った沙織や、故郷を離れた友人ふみとの記憶を振り返る。真人に顔へ触れられた直後、虎杖へ自分の人生は悪くなかったと伝える。
summary_full: 釘崎の幼なじみ・ふみの視点から、閉鎖的な故郷での幼少期が描かれる。釘崎は転入してきたふみと親しくなり、都会から来た年上の沙織を慕ったが、沙織一家は村人の嫌がらせを受けて去った。上京時、釘崎はふみに、いつか沙織を含む三人で再会すると約束していた。現在、真人に顔を触れられた釘崎は仲間たちを思い浮かべ、虎杖へ「悪くなかった」と伝えるよう頼んだ直後、左顔面が破裂して倒れる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Even when she was young, 野薔薇 had a tendency to stand out. She took to outsiders like ふみ and 沙織 and left her small village the first chance she got. 野薔薇 promised to see the girls again one day again but a lot has happened in her life since then. As the effects of 無為転変 take hold, 野薔薇 wants everyone to know it wasn't so bad in the end.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 野薔薇 asks to switch bags with ふみ. ふみ, a childhood friend of 野薔薇 moved into their small village on the countryside about the same time that she started grade school. Everyone in her class had either a red or black backpack, making her light blue one stand out. However, young 野薔薇 wanted the light blue one, approaching ふみ for a trade, beginning their friendship. ふみ got her backpack back after school with 野薔薇 kicking her own away out of annoyance. She then proceeds to beat up some boys for a jump rope. After that, 野薔薇 stopped by ふみ's house to play super smash brothers with her dad all the time. 野薔薇 didn't like the people in the village and only really hung out with ふみ. All ふみ can remember from 沙織 moving away is 野薔薇 crying. Their village was so small that it's harder to be a stranger than it is to make friends. At first, ふみ thought that could be a good thing but 野薔薇 didn't like it. Several years later she was brought red bean rice to celebrate her womanhood by a neighbor. This made her uncomfortable and helped her understand why 野薔薇 didn't like it in the small town. One day while they were still kids, 野薔薇 took ふみ to her "secret base". This place was actually a girl name 沙織's house. 沙織 was older than ふみ and moved into the village after her. 沙織 was always home and would welcome 野薔薇 and ふみ every time they would randomly visit. ふみ believed 野薔薇 changed after meeting 沙織, becoming more refined. After several incidents where villagers vandalized her home, 沙織 moved out of the village. All ふみ remembers about saying goodbye to 沙織 is 野薔薇's messy crying face. It was the first time she saw 野薔薇 cry and so she wasn't able to retain much else. 野薔薇 promising to see ふみ again before departing for 東京 呪術高専. In June of 2018, 野薔薇 got the approval to transfer to a school in 東京 . 野薔薇's grandmother resisted the decision, causing her to enroll late. 野薔薇 and ふみ met to say their goodbyes as the former prepared to board a train out of town. Excited to escape the village, 野薔薇 made it a point that she would never return. ふみ was disappointed that 野薔薇 didn't shed tears for her as she did for 沙織. This selfish line of thinking was so embarrassing and guilt-inducing for ふみ that it made it hard for her to speak at the time. They had not even spoken about 沙織 since the day she left. 野薔薇 gets ふみ's attention and tells her that when they reunite, the three of them should all be together. 野薔薇 blushes from the influx of emotions and after a moment, ふみ cries and agrees with her. In the present day, 沙織 works in an office during the late hours of the night. Her co-worker points out something dangerous is happening in 渋谷 but 沙織 ignores it. 沙織 tells her about her time on the countryside and how she met a young girl named 野薔薇. If 野薔薇 and ふみ saw her today, 沙織 thinks they would be disappointed. " It wasn't so bad! " Meanwhile, 野薔薇 holds her face and recalls everyone in the village being crazy. She used to believe that lots of people were crazy and got in the way of other people's lives. That was until she attended 東京 呪術高専 and learned that being crazy isn't so bad after all. She pictures the images of all her friends and apologizes to ふみ for being unable to meet her again in the future. 野薔薇 looks at 悠仁 's concerned face and tells him to make sure everyone knows it wasn't so bad. Just then, 野薔薇's face swells up around her left eye and bursts from the effects of 無為転変. 悠仁 watches in horror as 野薔薇's eye comes violently out of her head and her blood splatters on his face.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 釘崎野薔薇 ふみ 沙織 五条悟 (想像) 伏黒恵 (想像) 禪院真希 (想像) 狗巻棘 (想像) パンダ (想像) 虎杖悠仁
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 渋谷 渋谷駅 野薔薇の故郷 渋谷駅
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: The 渋谷事変 虎杖悠仁 & 釘崎野薔薇 vs. 真人 虎杖悠仁 & 釘崎野薔薇 vs. 真人
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 真人の術式 無為転変

key_events_verified_phase7: ふみと釘崎の幼少期が示される
釘崎と沙織の交流と別離が示される
釘崎がふみに三人での再会を約束する
無為転変で釘崎の左顔面が損傷する
verification_notes_phase7: 集英社公式14～16巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第七段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
